name: Moms Mabley
bio: Jackie Moms Mabley was an American stand-up comedian who became a veteran star of the Chitlin Circuit before crossing over to mainstream television in the 1960s. Performing as a frumpy, toothless old woman in a housedress, she used the disarming persona to deliver frank material on race, sex, and her preference for young men, and she was the first female comic to play the Apollo Theater.

timeline.ev: Comes out publicly, becoming one of the first openly gay comedians
First female comic to perform at Harlems Apollo Theater
Plays Carnegie Hall as she reaches white audiences
Begins multiple appearances on The Smothers Brothers Comedy Hour
Her cover of Abraham, Martin and John reaches the Billboard Hot 100
Debuts on The Ed Sullivan Show

accolades: First female comedian to perform at the Apollo Theater (1939)
Among the first openly gay stand-up comedians
Subject of the 2013 documentary Whoopi Goldberg Presents Moms Mabley

specials.t: Moms Mabley at the Geneva Conference
